history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. Moving forward would step into lava at (1,2). I need to go down to navigate around the lava. Turning right will orient me downward (v), which allows safe movement along column 1 initially.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down. The cell directly ahead (2,1) is floor (`.`) and safe to enter. I will move forward to start descending along column 1 towards row 5, then later turn right and proceed to the goal avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at (2,1) facing down. The cell directly ahead (3,1) is floor (`.`), so moving forward is safe. Continuing down column 1 is a good path to bypass the lava to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3,1) facing down. The cell ahead (4,1) is floor, so moving forward is safe. I'll continue down column 1 to reach row 5 where I can turn right and approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column 1 facing down. The cell ahead (row 5, col 1) is floor. Moving forward keeps me on a safe path downward, away from the lava to the right. Next, I plan to reach row 6, then turn right and head east across the safe row 6 to column 6, then go south to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 1 facing down. The forward cell (6,1) is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go east across row 5 (which is all safe floor) to column 6, then head south to the goal. To do that, I must first turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 1, facing right ('>'). I need to move east along row 5 to column 6 to then go south to the goal. The cell ahead is floor, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 2, facing right ('>'). I need to continue moving east to reach column 6. The next cell is floor, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 3, facing right ('>'). I need to continue east to reach column 6. The next cell is floor, so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 4, facing right. The path east is clear. I plan to move to column 6, then turn right to go down to row 6 column 6, then continue to the goal at row 7 column 7. The next step is to move forward to column 5.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 5, column 5, facing right. The cell ahead (5,6) is floor. I will move forward to reach (5,6), then plan to turn right to go down to (6,6), then to (7,6), and finally turn left to reach the goal at (7,7).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (5,6), facing right. The cell directly ahead (5,7) is floor, but moving there would lead to a dead end or lava later. The safer route to the goal is to go south from here: turn right to face down, then move to (6,6) (floor), then to (7,6) (floor), then turn left and move to goal (7,7). So I should turn right now.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I'm at (5,6) facing down. The cell ahead (6,6) is floor. I'll move forward to (6,6), then again to (7,6), then turn left to face the goal and move there.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell ahead (row 7, column 6) is floor, not lava. I can move forward to (7,6), then turn left to face right and move to the goal at (7,7).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I'm at (7,6) facing down. The goal is at (7,7) directly to my right. To reach it, I need to turn left (counter-clockwise) so I face right (east), then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,6) facing east. The goal is directly in front of me at (7,7). I can move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
